name: Pitasara (Indian Kino Tree)
usesInAyurveda: Tridoshic Modulation: Pacifies Kapha and Pitta.
mainMedicinalUses: Helps in weight reduction and metabolism enhancement.
Used for skin ailments and internal bleeding.
plantProfile: Wood contains Pterostilbene, a potent antioxidant.
preparationMethods: Soak wood in water overnight and drink.
